Experience

In 2010 we discovered Bitcoin, but like many we did not feel any urgency. After spending two cycles dabbling and dipping our toes in various projects we decided to go all in early 2017 and again in 2020. Now we're now able to leverage our 14 years of experience to manage a portfolio of coins based on current naratives for 2024-2025 bull run as well as the upcoming bear market in 2026.

Investment Strategy

10% APT
